items.title_neutral: How JSON.stringify Corrupted 150,000 Rows in My Postgres Database

The driver serialized them a second time, so ~150,000 values across ten columns were silently saved as jsonb strings, not arrays. They looked right and matched no filters. Root cause, detection (jsonb_typeof = 'string'),…

items.title_original: Building a Graph-Vector Hybrid Memory Layer for AI Agents
items.title_neutral: Building a Graph-Vector Hybrid Memory Layer for AI Agents
items.excerpt: I built a memory system for AI agents that distills task failures into single actionable rules — stored in ChromaDB and linked conceptually in a Neo4j graph — instead of dumping raw conversation logs. Includes rule decay, multi-tenancy, and an honest look at what's still unranked in retrieval.
